tests.question: Какие станки есть на заводе?
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name, m.num, m.oeeplan FROM mdc_machine m LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, m.num, m.oeeplan FROM mdc_machine m LIMIT 50

tests.question: Какие подразделения (цеха) есть в системе MDC?
tests.actual_sql: SELECT d.name AS dept_name FROM mdc_dept d LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT d.name FROM mdc_dept d LIMIT 50

tests.question: Какие состояния станков есть в справочнике?
tests.actual_sql: SELECT mp.name AS state FROM mdc_machine_param mp LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT mp.name, mp.short_name, mp.code, mp.priority FROM mdc_machine_param mp LIMIT 50

tests.question: Какие группы состояний станков существуют?
tests.actual_sql: SELECT gp.name, gp.short_name, gp.color, gp.plan_value FROM mdc_group_param gp LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT gp.name, gp.short_name, gp.plan_value FROM mdc_group_param gp LIMIT 50

tests.question: Покажи историю состояний станков
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, mp.name AS state, mv.start_time, mv.end_time FROM mdc_monitoring_value_129 mv JOIN mdc_machine m ON mv.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON mv.machine_param_id = mp.id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, mp.name AS state, mv.start_time, mv.end_time FROM mdc_monitoring_value_129 mv JOIN mdc_machine m ON mv.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON mv.machine_param_id = mp.id LIMIT 50

tests.question: Какие программы выполнялись на станках?
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, l.name_up, l.dt_start, l.dt_end, l.processing_time FROM mdc_operating_program_execution_log l JOIN mdc_machine m ON l.machine_id = m.id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, l.name_up, l.dt_start, l.dt_end, l.processing_time FROM mdc_operating_program_execution_log l JOIN mdc_machine m ON l.machine_id = m.id LIMIT 50

tests.question: Покажи расписание работы станков
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, sb.name, sb.week_day_num, sb.smena_num, sbi.time_from, sbi.time_to FROM mdc_shedule_base sb JOIN mdc_machine m ON sb.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_shedule_base_item sbi ON sb.id = sbi.shedule_base_id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, sb.name, sb.week_day_num, sb.smena_num, sbi.time_from, sbi.time_to FROM mdc_shedule_base sb JOIN mdc_machine m ON sb.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_shedule_base_item sbi ON sb.id = sbi.shedule_base_id LIMIT 50

tests.question: Покажи настройки контроля параметров на станках
tests.answer_reason: Ошибка: Ошибка базы данных: no such column: tcs.machine_id
tests.actual_sql: SELECT tcs.name AS setting_name, m.name AS machine, mp.name AS param_name, tcs.group_param_id, tcs.machine_param_id FROM mdc_technology_control_setting tcs JOIN mdc_machine m ON tcs.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON tcs.machine_param_id = mp.id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT tcs.name, tcs.group_param_id, tcs.machine_param_id FROM mdc_technology_control_setting tcs LIMIT 50
tests.error: Ошибка базы данных: no such column: tcs.machine_id

tests.question: Покажи журнал нарушений контроля параметров
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, mp.name AS param_name, tcl.param_value, tct.type_id, tcl.dt_start, tcl.dt_end, tct.is_emergency, tct.is_tolerance FROM mdc_technology_control_log tcl JOIN mdc_technology_control_setting tcs ON tcl.technology_control_setting_id = tcs.id JOIN mdc_technology_control_type tct ON tcs.id = tct.technology_control_setting_id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON tcs.machine_param_id = mp.id JOIN mdc_machine m ON mp.parent_id = m.id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT tcl.technology_control_setting_id, tcl.param_in_machine_id, tcl.param_value, tcl.dt_start, tcl.dt_end FROM mdc_technology_control_log tcl LIMIT 50

tests.question: Покажи состояния станков, привязанные к группам
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, mp.name AS state, mv.start_time, mv.end_time FROM mdc_monitoring_value_129 mv JOIN mdc_machine m ON mv.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON mv.machine_param_id = mp.id JOIN mdc_machine_param_in_group mpg ON mp.id = mpg.mdc_machine_param_id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT mpg.mdc_machine_param_id, mpg.mdc_group_param_id FROM mdc_machine_param_in_group mpg LIMIT 50

tests.question: Покажи станки с указанием их цеха
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name, m.num, d.name AS dept_name FROM mdc_machine m JOIN mdc_dept d ON m.dept_id = d.id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name, m.num, d.name AS dept_name FROM mdc_machine m JOIN mdc_dept d ON m.dept_id = d.id LIMIT 50

tests.question: Кто и какие программы выполнял на станках?
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, w.surname, w.name, l.name_up, l.dt_start, l.processing_time FROM mdc_operating_program_execution_log l JOIN mdc_machine m ON l.machine_id = m.id JOIN hr_worker w ON l.worker_id = w.id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, w.surname, w.name, l.name_up, l.dt_start, l.processing_time FROM mdc_operating_program_execution_log l JOIN mdc_machine m ON l.machine_id = m.id JOIN hr_worker w ON l.worker_id = w.id LIMIT 50

tests.question: Покажи детали, которые обрабатывались на станках
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, au.name AS assembly_unit FROM mdc_machine m JOIN mdc_operating_program_assembly_unit opa ON m.id = opa.machine_id JOIN tp_assembly_unit au ON opa.id_assembly_unit = au.id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, au.name AS detail_name, opa.name_up AS program_name FROM mdc_operating_program_assembly_unit opa JOIN mdc_machine m ON opa.machine_id = m.id JOIN tp_assembly_unit au ON opa.id_assembly_unit = au.id ORDER BY m.name, au.name

tests.question: Покажи какие состояния отслеживаются на каждом станке
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, mp.name AS state FROM mdc_machine m JOIN mdc_param_in_machine pm ON m.id = pm.machine_id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON pm.machine_param_id = mp.id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, mp.name AS param_name FROM mdc_param_in_machine pim JOIN mdc_machine m ON pim.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON pim.machine_param_id = mp.id LIMIT 50

tests.question: Покажи нарушения контроля с привязкой к станкам
tests.answer_reason: Ошибка: Ошибка базы данных: no such column: mp.name
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, mp.name AS param_name, tcl.param_value, tcl.dt_start, tcl.dt_end, tct.type_id, tct.is_emergency, tct.is_tolerance FROM mdc_technology_control_log tcl JOIN mdc_param_in_machine pm ON tcl.param_in_machine_id = pm.id JOIN mdc_machine m ON pm.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_technology_control_setting tcs ON tcl.technology_control_setting_id = tcs.id JOIN mdc_technology_control_type tct ON tcs.id = tct.technology_control_setting_id WHERE tct.is_emergency = 1 OR tct.is_tolerance = 1 LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, tcs.name AS control_setting, tcl.param_value, tcl.dt_start, tcl.dt_end FROM mdc_technology_control_log tcl JOIN mdc_param_in_machine pim ON tcl.param_in_machine_id = pim.id JOIN mdc_machine m ON pim.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_technology_control_setting tcs ON tcl.technology_control_setting_id = tcs.id LIMIT 50
tests.error: Ошибка базы данных: no such column: mp.name

tests.question: Покажи особые даты в расписании станков (праздники)
tests.actual_sql: SELECT sm.shedule_date, d.name AS dept_name, m.name AS machine_name FROM mdc_shedule_meta sm LEFT JOIN mdc_dept d ON sm.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN mdc_machine m ON sm.machine_id = m.id WHERE sm.is_holiday = 1 LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, sm.shedule_date, sm.is_holiday FROM mdc_shedule_meta sm JOIN mdc_machine m ON sm.machine_id = m.id LIMIT 50

tests.question: Покажи типы контроля параметров
tests.actual_sql: SELECT tcs.name AS setting_name, tct.type_id, tct.is_tolerance, tct.is_emergency FROM mdc_technology_control_type tct JOIN mdc_technology_control_setting tcs ON tct.technology_control_setting_id = tcs.id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT tct.id, tct.technology_control_setting_id, tct.type_id, tct.is_tolerance, tct.is_emergency FROM mdc_technology_control_type tct LIMIT 50

tests.question: Какое общее время простоев у каждого станка?
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, SUM(r.state_time) AS total_downtime_seconds FROM rep_monitoring_by_priority r JOIN mdc_machine m ON r.mdc_machineid = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON r.mdc_machine_param_id = mp.id WHERE mp.id IN (SELECT mdc_machine_param_id FROM mdc_machine_param_in_group WHERE mdc_group_param_id IN (SELECT id FROM mdc_group_param WHERE name LIKE '%Простой%')) GROUP BY m.name
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, SUM(r.state_time) AS total_downtime_seconds FROM rep_monitoring_by_priority r JOIN mdc_machine m ON r.mdc_machineid = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON r.mdc_machine_param_id = mp.id WHERE mp.id IN (SELECT mdc_machine_param_id FROM mdc_machine_param_in_group WHERE mdc_group_param_id IN (SELECT id FROM mdc_group_param WHERE name LIKE '%Простой%')) GROUP BY m.name

tests.question: Сколько программ выполнено на каждом станке?
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, COUNT(l.id) AS program_count FROM mdc_operating_program_execution_log l JOIN mdc_machine m ON l.machine_id = m.id GROUP BY m.name
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, COUNT(l.id) AS program_count, SUM(l.processing_time) AS total_time FROM mdc_operating_program_execution_log l JOIN mdc_machine m ON l.machine_id = m.id GROUP BY m.name

tests.question: Покажи аналитику по состояниям станков из rep_monitoring_by_priority
tests.actual_sql: SELECT r.mdc_machineid, m.name AS machine, r.mdc_machine_param_id, mp.name AS state, r.from_date, r.to_date, r.state_time, r.shift_num, r.dt_calc FROM rep_monitoring_by_priority r JOIN mdc_machine m ON r.mdc_machineid = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON r.mdc_machine_param_id = mp.id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, mp.name AS state_name, r.from_date, r.to_date, r.state_time, r.shift_num FROM rep_monitoring_by_priority r JOIN mdc_machine m ON r.mdc_machineid = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON r.mdc_machine_param_id = mp.id LIMIT 50

tests.question: Какие программы привязаны к каким сборочным единицам на каждом станке?
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, opa.name_up AS program_name, au.name AS assembly_unit_name FROM mdc_operating_program_assembly_unit opa JOIN mdc_machine m ON opa.machine_id = m.id JOIN tp_assembly_unit au ON opa.id_assembly_unit = au.id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, opa.name_up, au.name AS assembly_unit FROM mdc_operating_program_assembly_unit opa JOIN mdc_machine m ON opa.machine_id = m.id JOIN tp_assembly_unit au ON opa.id_assembly_unit = au.id LIMIT 50

tests.question: Покажи настройки контроля с привязкой к группам состояний и параметрам
tests.actual_sql: SELECT tcs.name AS control_setting, gp.name AS group_param, mp.name AS machine_param FROM mdc_technology_control_setting tcs JOIN mdc_group_param gp ON tcs.group_param_id = gp.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON tcs.machine_param_id = mp.id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT tcs.name, gp.name AS group_name, mp.name AS param_name FROM mdc_technology_control_setting tcs JOIN mdc_group_param gp ON tcs.group_param_id = gp.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON tcs.machine_param_id = mp.id LIMIT 50

tests.question: Покажи станки у которых плановый OEE больше нуля
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name, m.num, m.oeeplan FROM mdc_machine m WHERE m.oeeplan > 0 LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name, m.num, m.oeeplan FROM mdc_machine m WHERE m.oeeplan > 0 LIMIT 50

tests.question: Покажи полную информацию о работе каждого станка: цех, программы, оператор
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, m.num, d.name AS dept_name, l.name_up AS last_program, l.dt_start AS program_start, l.processing_time, w.surname AS worker_surname, w.name AS worker_name, w.prof_name FROM mdc_machine m LEFT JOIN mdc_dept d ON m.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN mdc_operating_program_execution_log l ON m.id = l.machine_id LEFT JOIN hr_worker w ON l.worker_id = w.id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, m.num, d.name AS dept_name, l.name_up AS last_program, l.dt_start AS program_start, l.processing_time, w.surname AS worker_surname, w.name AS worker_name, w.prof_name FROM mdc_machine m LEFT JOIN mdc_dept d ON m.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN mdc_operating_program_execution_log l ON m.id = l.machine_id LEFT JOIN hr_worker w ON l.worker_id = w.id ORDER BY m.name

tests.question: Сравни загрузку и простой станков по каждому цеху
tests.actual_sql: SELECT r.dept_num, hd.name AS dept_name, SUM(r.mdc_machine_load_time) AS total_load_time, SUM(r.mdc_machine_break_time) AS total_break_time FROM rep_main_analitic r JOIN hr_dept hd ON r.dept_num = hd.root_num GROUP BY r.dept_num, hd.name
tests.expected_sql: SELECT d.name AS dept_name, r.mdc_machine_load_time AS load_time, r.mdc_machine_break_time AS break_time, r.mdc_machine_fund AS fund_time, ROUND(r.mdc_machine_load_time * 100.0 / r.mdc_machine_fund, 2) AS load_percent FROM rep_main_analitic r JOIN hr_dept d ON r.dept_num = d.root_num WHERE r.mdc_machine_fund > 0 ORDER BY load_percent DESC

tests.question: Какие станки имели наибольший простой в последний месяц?
tests.answer_reason: Ошибка: Ошибка базы данных: near "1": syntax error
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, SUM(r.state_time) AS total_downtime_seconds FROM rep_monitoring_by_priority r JOIN mdc_machine m ON r.mdc_machineid = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON r.mdc_machine_param_id = mp.id JOIN mdc_machine_param_in_group mpg ON mp.id = mpg.mdc_machine_param_id JOIN mdc_group_param gp ON mpg.mdc_group_param_id = gp.id WHERE gp.name LIKE '%Простой%' AND r.dt_calc >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) GROUP BY m.name ORDER BY total_downtime_seconds DESC
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, mp.name AS state_name, SUM(r.state_time) AS total_seconds FROM rep_monitoring_by_priority r JOIN mdc_machine m ON r.mdc_machineid = m.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON r.mdc_machine_param_id = mp.id WHERE r.from_date >= date('now', '-1 month') GROUP BY m.name, mp.name ORDER BY total_seconds DESC LIMIT 10
tests.error: Ошибка базы данных: near "1": syntax error

tests.question: Покажи состояния станков с группировкой по группам состояний
tests.actual_sql: SELECT gp.name AS group_name, mp.name AS state, COUNT(*) AS count FROM mdc_monitoring_value_129 mv JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON mv.machine_param_id = mp.id JOIN mdc_machine_param_in_group mpg ON mp.id = mpg.mdc_machine_param_id JOIN mdc_group_param gp ON mpg.mdc_group_param_id = gp.id GROUP BY gp.name, mp.name LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT gp.name AS group_name, mp.name AS param_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM mdc_machine_param_in_group mpg JOIN mdc_group_param gp ON mpg.mdc_group_param_id = gp.id JOIN mdc_machine_param mp ON mpg.mdc_machine_param_id = mp.id GROUP BY gp.name, mp.name

tests.question: Покажи расписание станков с временными интервалами и привязкой к цехам
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, sb.name AS shedule_name, sb.week_day_num, sb.smena_num, sbi.time_from, sbi.time_to, d.name AS dept_name FROM mdc_shedule_base sb JOIN mdc_machine m ON sb.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_dept d ON m.dept_id = d.id JOIN mdc_shedule_base_item sbi ON sb.id = sbi.shedule_base_id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, d.name AS dept_name, sb.name AS schedule_name, sb.week_day_num, sb.smena_num, sbi.time_from, sbi.time_to FROM mdc_shedule_base sb JOIN mdc_machine m ON sb.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_dept d ON sb.dept_id = d.id JOIN mdc_shedule_base_item sbi ON sb.id = sbi.shedule_base_id ORDER BY m.name, sb.week_day_num

tests.question: Покажи все нарушения контроля с названиями станков и настройками
tests.answer_reason: Ошибка: Ошибка базы данных: no such table: mdc_technology_control_setting_in_machine
tests.actual_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, tcs.name AS setting_name, tcl.param_value, tcl.dt_start, tcl.dt_end FROM mdc_technology_control_log tcl JOIN mdc_technology_control_setting tcs ON tcl.technology_control_setting_id = tcs.id JOIN mdc_technology_control_setting_in_machine tcsim ON tcs.id = tcsim.technology_control_setting_id JOIN mdc_machine m ON tcsim.machine_id = m.id LIMIT 50
tests.expected_sql: SELECT m.name AS machine, tcs.name AS setting_name, tcl.param_value, tcl.dt_start, tcl.dt_end FROM mdc_technology_control_log tcl JOIN mdc_param_in_machine pim ON tcl.param_in_machine_id = pim.id JOIN mdc_machine m ON pim.machine_id = m.id JOIN mdc_technology_control_setting tcs ON tcl.technology_control_setting_id = tcs.id ORDER BY tcl.dt_start DESC
tests.error: Ошибка базы данных: no such table: mdc_technology_control_setting_in_machine
